results.title: Hamish Blake’s Cake Night Is Back For 2026 & This Adventure Time Treat Is MasterChef AU Level
results.description: Crack open the Tia Maria and put on the footy franks! It’s officially time for Hamish Blake‘s Cake Night, and honestly, this one could give the comedian MasterChef Australia status. In the 2026 rendition of the iconic Hamish Blake cake night, the beloved entertainment icon confirmed he was tasked with making an Adventure Time-inspired [...] The post Hamish Blake’s Cake Night Is Back For 2026 & This Adventure Time Treat Is MasterChef AU Level appeared first on PEDESTRIAN.TV .
